note: AWS/GCP/Azure entries are architectural equivalence mappings, not claims of live implementation in those providers.

controls.yandex_cloud: GitHub Actions OIDC federation with Yandex Cloud IAM token exchange and no static cloud key committed to CI.
controls.aws: IAM OIDC provider for GitHub Actions with role trust policy scoped by repository, branch, audience, and least-privilege role permissions.
controls.gcp: Workload Identity Federation provider for GitHub Actions mapped to a service account with least-privilege IAM roles.
controls.azure: Microsoft Entra workload identity federation using federated credentials on an app registration or managed identity.
controls.portfolio_status: Validated in Yandex Cloud; mapped to AWS/GCP/Azure equivalent patterns.

controls.yandex_cloud: Audit Trails retained as the cloud audit evidence source for bootstrap and supply-chain activity.
controls.aws: CloudTrail with S3/KMS retention, optional CloudWatch Logs integration, and organization trail for multi-account environments.
controls.gcp: Cloud Audit Logs with log sinks to Cloud Storage or BigQuery for retention and investigation workflows.
controls.azure: Azure Activity Log and Diagnostic Settings routed to Log Analytics, Storage Account, or Event Hub.
controls.portfolio_status: Validated as retained Yandex Cloud audit control; cleanup deferred until final evidence export.

controls.yandex_cloud: Terraform environments and controlled run scripts create, validate, evidence, and destroy short-lived resources.
controls.aws: Terraform modules for IAM, EKS, ECR, CloudTrail, S3 evidence storage, and security baseline resources.
controls.gcp: Terraform modules for IAM, GKE, Artifact Registry, Cloud Audit Logs sinks, and storage-based evidence retention.
controls.azure: Terraform modules for AKS, ACR, Monitor/Activity Logs, Storage Account, RBAC, and federated identity.
controls.portfolio_status: Validated with short-lived Yandex Cloud runs and zero-resource cleanup discipline.

controls.yandex_cloud: Short-lived Managed Kubernetes clusters used for baseline/remediation and admission evidence runs.
controls.aws: Amazon EKS cluster lifecycle with managed node groups, IRSA, private endpoint options, and short-lived test environments.
controls.gcp: GKE standard or autopilot lifecycle with Workload Identity, private clusters, and controlled node pools.
controls.azure: AKS lifecycle with Azure CNI, managed identities, workload identity, and controlled node pools.
controls.portfolio_status: Validated in Yandex Managed Kubernetes with destroy verification.

controls.yandex_cloud: Baseline and hardened Kubernetes manifests demonstrate securityContext, read-only root filesystem, non-root execution, and restricted runtime posture.
controls.aws: Equivalent hardening for EKS workloads using Pod Security Admission, Kyverno/Gatekeeper, and securityContext standards.
controls.gcp: Equivalent hardening for GKE workloads using Policy Controller, Pod Security Admission, and hardened workload specs.
controls.azure: Equivalent hardening for AKS using Azure Policy for Kubernetes, Gatekeeper/Kyverno, and secure workload specs.
controls.portfolio_status: Validated through before/after package and final metrics.

controls.yandex_cloud: Kyverno admission controller denies insecure workload and allows hardened workload on Managed Kubernetes.
controls.aws: Kyverno or Gatekeeper enforcement on EKS with repository/image, privilege, seccomp, and runtime policy gates.
controls.gcp: Policy Controller/Gatekeeper or Kyverno enforcement on GKE with equivalent workload admission controls.
controls.azure: Azure Policy for Kubernetes, Gatekeeper, or Kyverno enforcement on AKS with equivalent workload admission controls.
controls.portfolio_status: Validated in Yandex Managed Kubernetes with Kyverno-specific denial evidence.

controls.yandex_cloud: Yandex Container Registry receives demo images pushed through GitHub Actions OIDC without durable cloud credentials.
controls.aws: Amazon ECR repository with GitHub OIDC role-based push and repository policy controls.
controls.gcp: Artifact Registry repository with Workload Identity Federation-based push and IAM-scoped writer role.
controls.azure: Azure Container Registry with federated identity-based login and scoped AcrPush/AcrPull permissions.

controls.yandex_cloud: Registry-pushed insecure and hardened images scanned with Syft, Trivy, and Grype; measurable vulnerability reduction documented.
controls.aws: ECR image scanning, Inspector, third-party scanners, SBOM generation, and CI/CD vulnerability gates.
controls.gcp: Artifact Analysis, Container Analysis notes/occurrences, third-party scanners, and CI/CD vulnerability gates.
controls.azure: Microsoft Defender for Cloud container image scanning, ACR integration, third-party scanners, and CI/CD gates.
controls.portfolio_status: Validated through generated SBOM and vulnerability reports.

controls.yandex_cloud: Admission policy requires hardened Yandex Container Registry image path and secure runtime posture.
controls.aws: EKS admission policies requiring ECR image sources and hardened runtime controls.
controls.gcp: GKE admission policies requiring Artifact Registry image sources and hardened runtime controls.
controls.azure: AKS admission policies requiring ACR image sources and hardened runtime controls.
controls.portfolio_status: Validated through Kyverno admission allow/deny evidence.

controls.yandex_cloud: Sanitized public evidence is separated from private runtime evidence, state files, kubeconfigs, and token-bearing material.
controls.aws: S3 evidence bucket with KMS encryption, lifecycle policy, object lock where required, and sanitized public report extraction.
controls.gcp: Cloud Storage evidence bucket with retention policy, CMEK where required, and sanitized public report extraction.
controls.azure: Storage Account evidence container with immutability/retention, encryption, and sanitized public report extraction.
controls.portfolio_status: Validated through public/private evidence separation and repository safety checks.

controls.yandex_cloud: Paid cloud resources are created only during controlled runs and destroyed with post-destroy verification.
controls.aws: Ephemeral AWS test accounts/environments with Terraform destroy, budgets, and post-destroy inventory checks.
controls.gcp: Ephemeral GCP projects or folders with Terraform destroy, budgets, and post-destroy inventory checks.
controls.azure: Ephemeral Azure resource groups with Terraform destroy, budgets, and post-destroy inventory checks.
controls.portfolio_status: Validated repeatedly through short-lived MKS and bootstrap resource boundaries.

controls.yandex_cloud: Final control matrix, risk register, remediation metrics, and publication boundaries define validated and non-validated claims.
controls.aws: Equivalent governance package maps cloud controls to AWS IAM, CloudTrail, EKS, ECR, Inspector, Security Hub, and Terraform controls.
controls.gcp: Equivalent governance package maps controls to IAM, Cloud Audit Logs, GKE, Artifact Registry, Security Command Center, and Terraform controls.
controls.azure: Equivalent governance package maps controls to Entra ID, Activity Logs, AKS, ACR, Defender for Cloud, Azure Policy, and Terraform controls.
